description: CCP load balancing and TDMA vectors with independent math oracles (hash_32, drift calc from spec).

vectors.name: tdma_slot_assignment_static_hash
vectors.description: Static slot from EUI-64 hash_32(FNV-1a32 basis 0x811c9dc5 per spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:123) mod num_slots per TDMA spec (CCP-15.8.3). Independent external arithmetic oracle.

vectors.name: guard_time_boundary_sf10
vectors.description: 50ms guard for 250ms slot tolerates 0.5% drift over 5s superframe.

vectors.name: drift_compensation_two_beacons
vectors.description: Offset correction from beacon arrival times for clock drift compensation.

vectors.name: ccp_load_high_util_rebalance
vectors.description: Load score triggers channel rebalance and TDMA slot reassignment when util>0.4.
